scenes.description: Usada Pekora and Amane Kanata perform 'Toushi no Tobira'.
A special 'Battle Bonus' slot machine segment featuring a buff version of Pekora.
Usada Pekora and Inugami Korone perform 'TOUGH BOY'.

subtitles.original: 狂い咲けよ 闘志の華よ

subtitles.original: 大輪の炎 闇をかき散らして
subtitles.english: Scatter the darkness with the flames of large blossoms

subtitles.original: 勇気と熱を盾に 掴め
subtitles.english: With courage and passion as your shield, seize it

subtitles.original: 辿り着こう 金色の空
